nasb.text: Do not gloat over your brother’s day, The day of his misfortune. And do not rejoice over the sons of Judah In the day of their destruction; Yes, do not boast In the day of their distress.

esv.text: But do not gloat over the day of your brother in the day of his misfortune; do not rejoice over the people of Judah in the day of their ruin; do not boast in the day of distress.

cnv.text: 你兄弟遭遇禍患的日子， 你不該看著不理； 猶大人被滅的日子， 你不該幸災樂禍； 他們遭難的日子， 你不該張口狂傲；

ccb.text: 你的亲族遭难之日， 你不该幸灾乐祸； 犹大人被灭的日子， 你不该兴高采烈； 他们遭难的日子， 你不该口出狂言；
